scripts.dev:infra: node ./scripts/setup-env.mjs && docker compose --env-file infra/compose/env/.env -f infra/compose/compose.base.yaml -f infra/compose/compose.hybrid.yaml up -d postgres file-server
scripts.dev:infra:down: node ./scripts/setup-env.mjs && docker compose --env-file infra/compose/env/.env -f infra/compose/compose.base.yaml -f infra/compose/compose.hybrid.yaml stop postgres file-server
scripts.test: pnpm exec turbo run test && pnpm test:file-server
scripts.docker:dev: node ./scripts/setup-env.mjs && docker compose --env-file infra/compose/env/.env -f infra/compose/compose.base.yaml -f infra/compose/compose.dev.yaml up --build
scripts.docker:test: node ./scripts/setup-env.mjs && docker compose --env-file infra/compose/env/.env -f infra/compose/compose.base.yaml -f infra/compose/compose.test.yaml up --abort-on-container-exit --exit-code-from api
scripts.docker:prod: node ./scripts/setup-env.mjs && docker compose --env-file infra/compose/env/.env -f infra/compose/compose.base.yaml -f infra/compose/compose.prod.yaml up -d
